The '''Kauronians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="TMEC" /> [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Kauron]] in the [[Meram sector/Legends|Meram sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEAOC" /><ref name="Planetnamia" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="Date">The section of "[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]" including Kauronians took place the [[Standard day/Legends|day]] before the start of {{Film|IV}}, which equates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> a number of Kauronian [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] were present on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. During that [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] watched several of them enter [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] in the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[City/Legends|settlement]].<ref name="TMEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kauronians appeared in "[[A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale]]," a [[1995]] short story written by [[Tom Veitch|Tom]] and [[Martha Veitch]] that was published in the ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'' anthology.<ref name="TMEC" />
